title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-21
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Polly did her daily rounds, checking on all the community apps and updating their health metrics in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md files.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee with a tiny clipboard checking on pixelated code-plants in a cozy greenhouse, representing the automated health checks of community apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt and holding a clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
